summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are planned. Hydrated open PRs are kept for independent maintainer/review handling because this shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled. Already-closed PRs are skipped as closed. Candidates with unavailable live state are escalated only for that missing hydration decision.
